ksa_text: Knowledge of distributed computing concepts relevant to data processing at scale, including data partitioning strategies, parallel execution models, fault tolerance mechanisms, data locality optimization, and the CAP theorem.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-K-006 (TF, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3940 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.394, dcwf=0.388, ddat=0.370) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3940 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does TF-domain KSA TF-K-006 (composite 0.3940) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3940 for TF domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms TF domain KSA at composite 0.3940 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3940, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
